narrative:
07 Ohio Senate district has 263,880 registered voters, with 54.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 30.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 14.7 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean -2.2% D−R vs -26.2% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
